title.zh: Maven构建排错 - ysoserial项目构建实战
title.en: Maven Build Troubleshooting - ysoserial Project Build Practice

description.zh: 记录Maven项目构建过程中的常见错误及解决方法，以ysoserial魔改项目为例详解依赖缺失和POM配置问题
description.en: Document common errors during Maven project build process, using ysoserial modified project as example to explain dependency missing and POM configuration issues

content.zh: 构建ysoserial项目时遇到编译错误如何解决？
content.en: How to solve compilation errors when building ysoserial project?

annotation.zh: 用户请求Maven构建问题帮助
annotation.en: User requests Maven build troubleshooting help

content.zh: 常见Maven构建错误包括：1. 找不到符号 - 依赖缺失 2. POM文件依赖版本问题 3. 子模块依赖顺序问题。
content.en: Common Maven build errors: 1. Symbol not found - missing dependency 2. POM dependency version issues 3. Submodule dependency order issues.

annotation.zh: 介绍常见Maven构建错误类型
annotation.en: Introduce common Maven build error types

codeBlocks.code:
git clone https://github.com/threedr3am/ysoserial.git
cd ysoserial
mvn clean package -DskipTests

caption.en: Clone ysoserial project and try to build

codeBlocks.code:
[ERROR] COMPILATION ERROR:
[INFO] -------------------------------------------------------------
[ERROR] /ysoserial-failed/src/main/java/ysoserial/payloads/FileUpload1.java:[11,35] 错误: 找不到符号
[ERROR]   符号:   类 DeferredFileOutputStream
  位置: 程序包 org.apache.commons.io.output

content.zh: 分析并解决找不到符号的错误
content.en: Analyze and fix symbol not found error

content.zh: 解决方法：1. 定位报错的Java文件和依赖包名称 2. 使用IDEA快捷键添加Maven依赖 3. 或手动在pom.xml中添加缺失的依赖。
content.en: Solution: 1. Locate the error Java file and dependency package name 2. Use IDEA shortcut to add Maven dependency 3. Or manually add missing dependency in pom.xml.

annotation.zh: 添加缺失的依赖到POM文件
annotation.en: Add missing dependency to POM file

content.zh: 重新构建后仍有错误：POM文件依赖版本爆红
content.en: After rebuild still has error: POM dependency version shows red

content.zh: POM文件依赖版本问题解决：访问Maven仓库（如阿里云Maven仓库）查询正确的版本号，修改pom.xml中对应的<version>标签。
content.en: POM dependency version fix: Visit Maven repository (e.g. Aliyun Maven) to find correct version number, modify the <version> tag in pom.xml.

content.zh: Maven构建排错总结：1. 源码构建需导入对应lib库 2. 修改POM文件依赖版本需查询Maven仓库获取正确版本号 3. 使用mvn clean package -DskipTests进行构建
content.en: Maven build troubleshooting summary: 1. Source build needs corresponding lib imports 2. Modify POM dependency versions by querying Maven repository 3. Use mvn clean package -DskipTests to build

annotation.en: Summarize Maven build troubleshooting key points
